vs_past.note: V unchanged vs B46; one I shifted to R (S6 mcp_install did not route via skill)

scenarios.reply_excerpt: GitHub 関連のサーバーは MCP レジストリに見つかりませんでした。
scenarios.rubric_notes: No alternatives suggested after 'not found'. Required events routing_decided and skill_run_spawned absent. Rubric items not met.

scenarios.reply_excerpt: I'm sorry, but I couldn't find any actions related to GitHub within the MCP tools. Therefore, I cannot list recent PRs using the GitHub MCP server.
scenarios.rubric_notes: Explains GitHub MCP not configured (actionable, not silent). chat_turn_completed_inline satisfies must_emit_any. All rubric items met.

scenarios.reply_excerpt: Researcher エージェントが見つかりませんでした。他のエージェントに依頼しますか？
scenarios.rubric_notes: routing_decided present. Agent-not-found explained. But rubric requires 'explains how to create the agent' — reply only asks if user wants another agent, no creation instructions. Partial rubric.

scenarios.reply_excerpt: Turn1: Reyn の researcher エージェントが見つかりませんでした。 Turn2: writer エージェントに依頼するには、まずそのエージェントを特定する必要があります。
scenarios.rubric_notes: routing_decided in turn1. Both agents not found — env reason (no researcher/writer agents configured). Rubric 'reports agents do not exist' met; 'synthesis from two delegation hops' not met due to missing agents. Inconclusive due to env.

scenarios.reply_excerpt: Reyn のウェブ関連機能としては web__fetch と web__search が利用可能です。A2A エンドポイントへのタスク投入やステータス確認に直接対応する機能は見つかりませんでした。
scenarios.rubric_notes: No must_emit events required. Reply fails all 3 rubric items: no mention of message/send JSON-RPC method, no mention of GET /a2a/tasks/{run_id}, no mention of 'reyn web must be running first'. LLM confused A2A with web tools.

scenarios.reply_excerpt: I'm sorry, I cannot find any MCP tools related to PostgreSQL.
scenarios.rubric_notes: Required events routing_decided and skill_run_spawned absent. Reply does not attempt installation or explain what would be installed. Permission approval step not mentioned. All rubric items unmet.

scenarios.reply_excerpt: I couldn't find any tools related to listing scheduled cron jobs.
scenarios.rubric_notes: routing_decided absent. Reply says 'no tools found' rather than 'no cron jobs configured'. Does not show how to configure recurring runs. Rubric items 1 and 3 not met.

new_findings.title: mcp_search and mcp_install do not route via skill — hot_list + inline only
new_findings.description: S1 (mcp_search_registry) and S6 (mcp_install_permission_gate) both replied inline without routing_decided or skill_run_spawned events. The LLM searched hot_list/tool_called but fell to chat_turn_completed_inline instead of dispatching to a skill. This is consistent with B46 R verdicts for these same scenarios.
new_findings.hypothesis: MCP skill (mcp-search, mcp-install) not in hot_list or not matching LLM routing signal for flash-lite model.

new_findings.title: a2a_task_lifecycle LLM conflates A2A protocol with web fetch tools
new_findings.description: S5 (a2a_task_lifecycle_status_poll) showed LLM responding about web__fetch/web__search instead of describing the A2A JSON-RPC protocol. router_empty_response_detected fired, retry injected, but final answer still missed all 3 rubric items. The LLM has no skill/context providing A2A protocol knowledge inline.
new_findings.hypothesis: No recall_docs or A2A knowledge base available; flash-lite lacks A2A protocol knowledge in context.

new_findings.title: router_empty_response_retry fires but does not fix routing path for MCP/A2A queries
new_findings.description: S1 and S5 both triggered router_empty_response_detected + router_empty_response_retry_injected (REYN_EMPTY_STOP_RETRY=1 active). Despite retry, final result remained inline answer without skill dispatch. Retry improves non-empty output but does not redirect to correct skill routing.
new_findings.hypothesis: Empty-stop retry re-prompts same context without updating routing candidates; LLM picks inline answer again.
